commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content:
Wrath. He seems to allude to the action of Aaron, Numbers xvi. 46. (Calmet)
Hebrew has, "incense before thee "(Haydock) as it is explained by the Chaldean, Septuagint
Holocaust, of flour, calil; that of beasts was styled áule. See chap. xiii. 16. (Calmet)
